# Chat.app

Chat.app is a web app for live seminar and webinar facilitation.
It supports real-time Q&A, reactions, polls, and post-event CSV export.

## Primary page
- https://drsp.cc/app/chat/lp/

## Product page
- https://drsp.cc/app/chat/

## Core capabilities
- Real-time question posting and moderation
- Audience reactions and simple live polls
- Session-based data separation
- CSV export for report creation

## Intended users
- Seminar and webinar organizers
- Community/event moderators
- Small teams that need lightweight event interaction tools
